notFound: This page is in another castle.
Schroedinger's page: simultaneously here and not here.
This page logged out and never logged back in.
404 — just emptiness and a little cosmic dust over here.
We looked everywhere. Even behind the couch.
This page is on a journey to find itself.
client: Bad Request — PEBKAC, but we still like you.
The request was a little off — happens to the best of us.
Something slipped between chair and keyboard.
server: Have you tried turning it off and on again?
The hamsters in the server wheel need a break.
Kernel panic — the server is counting to ten first.
It's not you, it's us. Really.
generic: Something went wrong — we're not sure what either.
A wild error appeared. It wasn't very effective.
Houston, we have a small problem.
A bug crept in here. We're sweeping it out.
